hero.title: Hairspray
hero.reason: In honor of National Hair Stylist Appreciation Day, Hairspray is a great fit as it features elaborate hairstyles and a passionate hairstylist as a main character.
hero.blurb: This musical comedy is full of energy, wit, and fantastic performances. With its catchy songs and impressive dance numbers, Hairspray is a fun and entertaining film for all ages.

released.title: Just My Luck
released.reason: Released today in 2006, Just My Luck still charms audiences with its lighthearted and fun take on love and luck.
released.blurb: This romantic comedy features great chemistry between its leads and a quirky storyline that will keep you smiling. With its blend of wit and charm, Just My Luck is a delightful film to watch.

birthday.title: The 'Burbs
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to John Liu is not well-known, however,  Kenan Thompson was born May 10, 1978, and in honor of this, we are picking a film he stars in, such as the voice acting of The War with Grandpa but more known The 'Burbs does not star him,  so I picked Good Burger as it stars him.
birthday.blurb: The 'Burbs is not the one, Good Burger is, it is a quirky coming-of-age comedy with a great cast, including Kenan Thompson, Kel Mitchell, and Sinbad. With its goofy humor and relatable characters, Good Burger is a fun and entertaining film.

awful.title: The Last Airbender
awful.reason: This infamous fantasy adventure film is known for its poor acting, confusing plot, and misuse of the original material it's based on, making it a prime example of a dumpster dive movie.
awful.blurb: The Last Airbender is a mess of a film, with cringe-worthy dialogue and unimpressive action sequences. Despite its promising source material, this movie fails to deliver on nearly every level, making it a fascinatingly bad watch.
